item.description:
# N1KO-STATE v1.0.13
**Sparkle update feed fix** — uses a stable appcast URL and bypasses cached GitHub release redirects so in-app update checks reliably detect new versions.
**Sparkle 更新源修复** — 使用稳定的 appcast 地址，并避免 GitHub 重定向缓存导致应用内检查不到新版本。
---
## Download / 下载
| Asset | Description | |-------|-------------| | **N1KO-STATE.dmg** | Universal binary (Apple Silicon + Intel). Drag to Applications. | | **N1KO-STATE-sparkle.zip** | In-app updater archive used by Sparkle. Normal manual installs should use the DMG. | | **appcast.xml** | Sparkle update feed for automatic update checks. |
**Install note:** If macOS blocks the ad-hoc signed app on first launch, run `xattr -cr /Applications/N1KO-STATE.app` in Terminal. You can also right-click **N1KO-STATE.app** -> **Open** on first launch.
**安装说明：** 如果首次打开被 macOS 拦截，优先在「终端」执行 `xattr -cr /Applications/N1KO-STATE.app`。也可以右键 **N1KO-STATE.app** -> **打开**（仅首次需要）。
---
## What's New / 本版本内容
### Reliable In-App Updates / 可靠的应用内更新
- Switched Sparkle feed to a stable URL on `main`: `appcast.xml` via `raw.githubusercontent.com`. - Manual **Check for Updates** now clears the URL cache before fetching the feed. - Release CI publishes an updated cumulative `appcast.xml` back to `main` after each tag build.
- Sparkle 更新源改为 `main` 分支上的稳定 `appcast.xml` 地址。 - 手动点击「检查更新」时会先清理 URL 缓存，再拉取 feed。 - 每次发版后 CI 会把新的 appcast 回写到 `main`。
### If you are on v1.0.11 or v1.0.12 / 如果你还在旧版本
- Quit N1KO-STATE, run `rm -rf ~/Library/Caches/com.n1ko.state.monitor`, reopen the app, then check for updates again. - Or download the DMG from this release page and reinstall.
- 退出应用，执行 `rm -rf ~/Library/Caches/com.n1ko.state.monitor`，重新打开后再检查更新。 - 或直接从本页下载 DMG 覆盖安装。
### Versioning / 版本同步
- Updated app version metadata to `1.0.13` / build `113`.
- 应用版本元数据更新为 `1.0.13` / build `113`。
---
## Full changelog / 完整变更
**Full changelog:** [v1.0.13 tag](https://github.com/baogutang/N1KO-STATE/releases/tag/v1.0.13)
